title: Gloriously Juicy Norwegian Apple Puff
description: A flexitarian-friendly Norwegian dish featuring apples and lamination-puff, perfect for a post-workout snack

ingredients.name: apples
ingredients.notes: Granny Smith or other tart variety

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt
Add cold butter and use a pastry blender to work it into the flour mixture until it resembles coarse crumbs
In a separate bowl, whisk together egg and milk
Add yeast to the egg mixture and stir to combine
Pour the egg mixture over the flour mixture and stir until a shaggy dough forms
Turn the dough out onto a floured surface and knead for 5 minutes
Roll the dough out into a large rectangle
Arrange sliced apples on one half of the dough, leaving a 1/2 inch border around the edges
Fold the other half of the dough over the apples and press the edges to seal
Use a sharp knife to cut a few slits in the top of the puff
